sentences.english: How do you think education will change in the next twenty years?
sentences.korean: 교육이 향후 20년간 어떻게 변할 것이라 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I think education will look dramatically different in twenty years.
sentences.korean: 20년 후 교육은 극적으로 달라 보일 거라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First AI tutors will provide personalized learning paths for every student adapting in real time to each student's pace and learning style.
sentences.korean: 첫째 AI 튜터가 모든 학생에게 맞춤형 학습 경로를 제공할 거예요. 각 학생의 속도와 학습 스타일에 실시간으로 적응하면서요.

sentences.english: Second the traditional lecture model will be replaced by project-based learning where students solve real-world problems in teams.
sentences.korean: 둘째 전통적 강의 모델은 학생이 팀으로 현실 문제를 해결하는 프로젝트 기반 학습으로 대체될 거예요.

sentences.english: Finally the concept of graduating at twenty-two and never studying again will disappear — lifelong learning will become the norm as careers change rapidly.
sentences.korean: 마지막으로 22세에 졸업하고 다시 공부하지 않는 개념은 사라질 거예요. 직업이 빠르게 변하면서 평생 학습이 표준이 될 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do you think competition is healthy or harmful for
